programmes.show_description: From street food to smart tech, traditions to trending lifestyles, Singapore Hour is your ultimate insider's guide to travel, work, and play in the Lion City.
CNA correspondents bring you the top stories of the day with 'live' reports and interviews to keep you up-to-date on the day's events.

Changsha is a city where history is a product and the night is a stage. In this episode, explore the "Entertainment Capital" of China to understand its explosive night economy. Go inside the massive T
Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

Chengdu is known as a city of leisure, but a revolution is happening after dark. As the pace of modern life accelerates, the city's youth are finding unique ways to cope. Join a "night forest blind wa
Indonesia's Navy is outdated and outgunned. So, in 2023, the government increased spending in the military budget, amidst growing tensions Indonesia's backyard - the South China Sea.
